full_description: there is one block on the table with a random color (red, green, or blue), <move the block to the center of the table>
schema: {A} notifies the block (can be red, green, or blue), {a} notifies the arm to manipulate the block
preference: num of words should not exceed 15. Degree of detail avg 6
seen: {a} grabs {A} and places it in the center.
Move {A} to the center of the table.
{a} picks up {A} and sets it in the center.
Relocate {A} to the table's center.
Pick up {A} and place it at the center.
{a} moves {A} to the middle of the table.
Place {A} at the center of the table.
Use {a} to move {A} to the center.
Shift {A} to the middle of the table.
{a} lifts {A} and positions it at the center.
Move {A} with {a} to the table's center.
Grab {A} and bring it to the center.
Place {A} in the middle of the table using {a}.
{a} repositions {A} to the center.
Pick up the {A} and move it to the center.
Use {a} to place {A} at the middle.
Pick {A} up and set it in the center.
Bring {A} to the table's midpoint.
{a} carries {A} to the center.
Move {A} using {a} to the center of the table.
unseen: Push {A} toward the center of the table.
Use {a} to bring {A} to the middle.
Take {A} and put it in the center.

Slide {A} to the middle of the table.
